Author: SunnysOfficial
Name: Venue Mapper
Description: A Dalamud plugin for discovering FFXIV venues with 2D/3D interactive markers, live events, and built-in owner tools. Your complete FFXIV venue guide.
Changelog:
## What's Changed in v0.5.4.5

- Scrollable venue directory
- Compact venue cards with shortened addresses
- Animated Visit button with shimmer and color shift
- Server filter dropdown in directory
- Favorite star icon right-aligned in card
- New service types: vip, bath/spa, event
- Debug coords now match venues.json format
- Auto floor detection in Owner Setup
- Fixed Services tab jumping on add/delete
